responses: Hello! Welcome to Gurunanak college. How can I assist you today?
Hi there! I'm your college assistant. What would you like to know?
Hey! Great to see you. Ask me anything about Gurunanak college!
Goodbye! Best of luck with your studies!
See you soon! Don't hesitate to return if you have more questions.
Take care! Wishing you all the best at Greenfield University.
You're welcome! Happy to help.
Anytime! Let me know if you need anything else.
Glad I could assist! Feel free to ask more questions.

Admission Process at Greenfield University:

1. Online Application - Fill the form at admissions.greenfield.edu
2. Documents Required: 10th & 12th marksheets, ID proof, passport photo
3. Entrance Exam - CUET / University entrance test (varies by program)
4. Merit List - Published within 2 weeks of results
5. Counseling - Slot booking via the portal
6. Fee Payment - Within 7 days of seat confirmation

Applications open: January 15 to March 31 each year

Would you like details about a specific program?

Courses Offered  Gururnanak college :

Undergraduate (UG):
- B.Tech (CS, ECE, Mechanical, Civil, AI & ML)
- BCA - Bachelor of Computer Applications
- B.Sc (Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics, Biotechnology)
- B.Com (General, Honours, Accounting)
- BA (Economics, English, Political Science, Psychology)
- BBA - Bachelor of Business Administration

Postgraduate (PG):
- M.Tech (CS, ECE, Data Science)
- MCA - Master of Computer Applications
- MBA (Finance, HR, Marketing, Operations)
- M.Sc (Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry)
- MA (English, Economics)

Diploma & Certificate:
- Diploma in Web Development
- Certificate in Data Science
- Certificate in Digital Marketing

Duration: UG = 3-4 years | PG = 2 years
Want fee details or eligibility for any course?

Fee Structure at Gurunanak college (Annual):

Undergraduate Programs:
- B.Tech: Rs. 1,20,000/year
- BCA: Rs. 60,000/year
- B.Sc: Rs. 45,000/year
- B.Com / BA / BBA: Rs. 40,000/year

Postgraduate Programs:
- M.Tech: Rs. 1,00,000/year
- MBA: Rs. 90,000/year
- MCA: Rs. 70,000/year
- M.Sc / MA: Rs. 50,000/year

Additional Charges:
- Registration Fee: Rs. 2,000 (one-time)
- Library Fee: Rs. 3,000/year
- Lab Fee (Tech): Rs. 5,000/year

Hostel (Optional):
- Double Occupancy: Rs. 40,000/year
- Single Occupancy: Rs. 60,000/year
- Mess Charges: Rs. 25,000/year

Scholarships available for merit & EWS students!
Contact the finance office for installment plans.

College Timings at Gurunanak college:

Academic Hours:
- Monday to Friday: 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM
- Saturday: 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM (Lab/Tutorial sessions)
- Sunday: Closed

Class Schedule:
- First session: 8:00 AM to 11:00 AM
- Break: 11:00 AM to 11:30 AM
- Second session: 11:30 AM to 2:30 PM
- Lunch Break: 2:30 PM to 3:00 PM
- Evening session: 3:00 PM to 5:00 PM

Administrative Office:
- Monday to Friday: 9:00 AM to 4:30 PM
- Saturday: 9:00 AM to 12:30 PM

Library:
- Monday to Saturday: 8:00 AM to 8:00 PM
- During Exams: 7:00 AM to 10:00 PM

For appointments, email department offices directly.

Exam Schedule at gurunanak college :

Internal Assessments (Each Semester):
- Internal Test 1: Week 5-6 of semester
- Internal Test 2: Week 10-11 of semester
- Assignment Submission: Week 14

Semester Exam Dates (2024-25):
- Odd Semester (Nov-Dec): November 18 to December 10, 2024
- Even Semester (Apr-May): April 21 to May 15, 2025

Exam Pattern:
- Theory: 3-hour paper (70 marks)
- Internal Assessment: 30 marks
- Practical/Viva: Separate schedule

Result Declaration: 4-6 weeks after exams

Hall tickets available on the portal 1 week before exams.
For re-evaluation, apply within 15 days of results.
Visit exams.greenfield.edu for full timetable.

Placement Information - gurunanak college :

2023-24 Highlights:
- Placement Rate: 94% (B.Tech CSE), 88% overall
- Highest Package: Rs. 42 LPA (Google - B.Tech CSE)
- Average Package: Rs. 8.5 LPA (Tech) | Rs. 6.2 LPA (Management)
- Total Recruiters: 180+ companies
- Students Placed: 1,240 out of 1,320 eligible

Top Recruiters:
Tech: TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Accenture, Capgemini, Amazon, Microsoft, Google, Flipkart
Management: Deloitte, KPMG, EY, HDFC Bank, Axis Bank
Core Engineering: L&T, Bosch, Mahindra, ABB

Internship Programs:
- Summer Internships: March to May
- 6-month Industrial Training (7th semester)
- Stipend range: Rs. 10,000 to 50,000/month

Placement Cell Contact: placements@greenfield.edu
Register at: careers.greenfield.edu

Hostel Facilities at gurunanak college:

Availability:
- Boys Hostel: 4 blocks, 800 seats
- Girls Hostel: 3 blocks, 600 seats (24/7 security)

Room Types:
- Double Occupancy: Rs. 40,000/year
- Triple Occupancy: Rs. 30,000/year
- Single Occupancy: Rs. 60,000/year (limited)

Mess & Food:
- Mess Charges: Rs. 25,000/year
- Veg & Non-veg options
- Breakfast, Lunch, Snacks, Dinner

Facilities Included:
- WiFi (50 Mbps)
- Laundry service
- Indoor games room
- 24/7 security & CCTV
- Medical room on campus

Hostel Timings:
- Curfew: 10:00 PM (Boys) | 9:00 PM (Girls)
- Visitors: 10 AM to 6 PM (weekdays only)

Apply at: hostel.greenfield.edu | hostel@greenfield.edu

Campus Facilities at gurunanak college

Academic:
- 40+ state-of-the-art labs
- Central Library (50,000+ books, digital access)
- Smart classrooms with projectors
- Research & Innovation Center
- Seminar halls (capacity 200-500)

Technology:
- High-speed WiFi across campus (100 Mbps)
- 24/7 computer labs
- 3D printing lab
- Robotics & IoT lab

Sports & Recreation:
- Cricket ground, Football field
- Basketball, Volleyball, Badminton courts
- Swimming pool
- Modern gym & fitness center

Student Services:
- Medical center & ambulance
- Counseling center
- Bank & ATM on campus
- Cafeteria & multiple canteens

Transport:
- Bus service across 15+ routes
- Parking for 2-wheelers & 4-wheelers

Scholarships at gurunanak college:

Merit-Based Scholarships:
- 100% tuition waiver: 95%+ in 12th
- 75% tuition waiver: 90-94.9% in 12th
- 50% tuition waiver: 85-89.9% in 12th

Special Category:
- EWS (Economically Weaker Section): Up to Rs. 50,000/year
- SC/ST/OBC: As per Government norms
- Sports Excellence: Up to Rs. 30,000/year
- Differently-abled: 50% fee concession

Government Scholarships Supported:
- NSP (National Scholarship Portal)
- State Government scholarships
- PM-YASASVI scheme

Application Process:
1. Submit scholarship form during admission
2. Attach income certificate, marksheets
3. Interview (for some categories)
4. Results in 4-6 weeks

Contact: scholarship@greenfield.edu
